overview.heading: Overview
overview.description: Frontend PHP Conference Hokkaido 2026 is a web frontend and PHP conference primarily for web frontend and PHP developers, welcoming software engineers from Hokkaido, across Japan, and around the world.

sponsors.heading: Sponsors
sponsors.description: We will introduce the sponsors supporting Frontend PHP Conference Hokkaido 2026 here.
sponsors.caption: // COMING SOON
sponsors.note: Sponsor program is being prepared. This board will be updated as soon as we have details.

staff.heading: Staff
staff.description: This conference is organized and run by a team of volunteer staff.
staff.caption: // CREDITS
staff.note: Staff page is in progress. Core member introductions will be published soon.

timetable.heading: Timetable
timetable.description: The session list and venue map will be published after proposals are selected.
timetable.caption: // SCHEDULE
timetable.note: Session slots are being arranged. Updates will be posted on News and our official X.

jobBoard.heading: Job Board
jobBoard.description: We are preparing a job board to feature openings from our sponsor companies; it will also be displayed at the venue.
jobBoard.caption: // HIRING
jobBoard.note: Details for sponsors interested in posting openings will be announced soon.
